contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.

Require Import Cubical.DPath Cubical.PathSquare Cubical.DPathSquare
  Cubical.PathCube Cubical.DPathCube.

(** In this file we prove that the torus is equivalent to the product of two circles. *)

(** Here is a cube filler for help with circle recursion into the torus *)

Definition c2t_square_and_cube
  : {s : PathSquare loop_a loop_a
      (ap (Circle_rec _ tbase loop_b) loop)
      (ap (Circle_rec _ tbase loop_b) loop)
    &  PathCube s surf hr hr
       (sq_G1 (Circle_rec_beta_loop _ _ _))
       (sq_G1 (Circle_rec_beta_loop _ _ _))}.

goals.conclusion:
{s
: PathSquare loop_a loop_a (ap (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b) loop)
    (ap (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b) loop)
&
PathCube s surf hr hr (sq_G1 (Circle_rec_beta_loop Torus tbase loop_b))
  (sq_G1 (Circle_rec_beta_loop Torus tbase loop_b))}

{s
: PathSquare loop_a loop_a (ap (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b) loop)
    (ap (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b) loop)
&
PathCube s surf hr hr (sq_G1 (Circle_rec_beta_loop Torus tbase loop_b))
  (sq_G1 (Circle_rec_beta_loop Torus tbase loop_b))}

contents: (** We define the map from the Torus to the Circles *)

goals.conclusion: Torus -> Circle * Circle
Torus -> Circle * Circle
Circle * Circle
?pb = ?pb
?pb = ?pb
PathSquare ?pla ?pla ?plb ?plb
Circle * Circle

contents: (* The point of the torus is taken to (base, base *)

goals.conclusion: (base, base) = (base, base)

contents: (* loop_a is taken to loop in the first *)

goals.conclusion: (base, base) = (base, base)

contents: (* loop_b is taken to loop in the second *)

goals.conclusion:
PathSquare (path_prod' loop 1) (path_prod' loop 1) 
  (path_prod' 1 loop) (path_prod' 1 loop)

contents: (* The square is the obvious product of squares *)

(** We now define the curried function from the circles to the torus. *)
(** TODO: It's easy to remove [Funext] from this definition by using [intro] and [revert] appropriately, but then the cube algebra in the proof of [c2t'_beta] would need to be updated. See https://github.com/HoTT/Coq-HoTT/pull/1824. *)

goals.conclusion: Circle -> Circle -> Torus
Circle -> Circle -> Torus
Circle -> Torus
?b = ?b
Circle -> Torus
Torus
?b = ?b
Torus

contents: (* The basepoint is sent to the point of the torus *)

goals.conclusion: tbase = tbase

contents: (* The second loop is sent to loop_b *)

goals.conclusion: Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b = Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b
Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b == Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b

contents: (* We use function extensionality here to induct *)

goals.conclusion:
(fun x : Circle =>
 Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x = Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x) base

transport
  (fun x : Circle =>
   Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x = Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x)
  loop ?b =
?b

(fun x : Circle =>
 Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x = Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x) base

contents: (* The first loop is sent to loop_a *)

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun x : Circle =>
   Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x = Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x)
  loop loop_a =
loop_a

PathSquare loop_a loop_a (ap (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b) loop)
  (ap (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b) loop)

contents: (* This DPath is actually a square *)
(* We apply the cap we found above *)

goals.conclusion: Circle * Circle -> Torus
Circle * Circle -> Torus

contents: (** Computation rules for c2t' as a cube filler *)

Definition c2t'_beta `{Funext} :
  {bl1 : PathSquare (ap (fun y => c2t' base y) loop) loop_b 1 1 &
  {bl2 : PathSquare (ap (fun x => c2t' x base) loop) loop_a 1 1 &
  PathCube (sq_ap011 c2t' loop loop) surf bl2 bl2 bl1 bl1}}.

goals.conclusion: PathCube (sq_ap011 c2t' loop loop) surf ?Goal0 ?Goal0 ?Goal ?Goal

PathCube
  (sq_dp (apD (fun y : Circle => ap (fun x : Circle => c2t' x y) loop) loop))
  surf ?Goal0 ?Goal0 ?Goal ?Goal

contents:
nrefine (cu_concat_lr (cu_ds (dp_apD_nat
    (fun y => ap_compose _ (fun f => f y) _) _)) _
    (sji0:=?[X1]) (sji1:=?X1) (sj0i:=?[Y1]) (sj1i:=?Y1) (pj11:=1)).

goals.conclusion:
PathCube
  (sq_dp
     (apD
        (fun y : Circle => ap (fun f : Circle -> Torus => f y) (ap c2t' loop))
        loop))
  surf ?X1 ?X1 ?Y1 ?Y1

PathCube
  (sq_dp
     (apD
        (fun x : Circle =>
         ap10
           (path_forall (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b)
              (Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b)
              (Circle_ind
                 (fun x0 : Circle =>
                  Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x0 =
                  Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x0)
                 loop_a (sq_dp^-1 c2t_square_and_cube.1)))
           x)
        loop))
  surf ?X2 ?X2 ?Y2 ?Y2

PathCube
  (sq_dp
     (apD
        (Circle_ind
           (fun x : Circle =>
            Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x = Circle_rec Torus tbase loop_b x)
           loop_a (sq_dp^-1 c2t_square_and_cube.1))
        loop))
  surf ?X3 ?X3 ?Y3 ?Y3
PathCube (sq_dp (sq_dp^-1 c2t_square_and_cube.1)) surf ?X4 ?X4 ?Y4 ?Y4
PathCube c2t_square_and_cube.1 surf ?X5 ?X5 ?Y5 ?Y5

contents: (** We now prove that t2c is a section of c2t *)
Definition t2c2t `{Funext} : c2t o t2c == idmap.

goals.conclusion: c2t o t2c == idmap
c2t o t2c == idmap
DPathSquare (fun x : Torus => c2t (t2c x) = x) surf ?Goal ?Goal ?Goal0 ?Goal0

contents: (* Our DPathSquare is really just a cube *)

goals.conclusion:
PathCube (sq_dp ?Goal) (sq_dp ?Goal) (sq_dp ?Goal0) 
  (sq_dp ?Goal0) (sq_ap (fun x : Torus => c2t (t2c x)) surf)
  (sq_ap idmap surf)

contents:
(* We pretend that our sides have sq_dpath o sq_dpath^-1
    and get rid of them *)

goals.conclusion:
PathCube ?Goal ?Goal ?Goal0 ?Goal0
  (sq_ap (fun x : Torus => c2t (t2c x)) surf) (sq_ap idmap surf)

contents: (* Apply a symmetry to get the faces on the right side *)

goals.conclusion:
PathCube (sq_ap (fun x : Torus => c2t (t2c x)) surf) 
  (sq_ap idmap surf) (sq_tr ?Goal) (sq_tr ?Goal) (sq_tr ?Goal0)
  (sq_tr ?Goal0)

PathCube (sq_ap (fun x : Torus => c2t (t2c x)) surf) 
  (sq_ap idmap surf) ?Goal ?Goal ?Goal0 ?Goal0

contents: (* Now we finish the proof with the following composition of cubes *)

(* NOTE: The last step in the previous proof can be done as a sequence of
   refines however Coq really struggles to unify this. Below is the original
   way we proved the last statement before making it short and sweet. As can
   be seen, we need to give refine hints using existential variables which is
   tedious to write out, and perhaps motivates why we wrote it as one big
   concatenation. Ideally the way below should be as smooth as the way above,
   since above is difficult to write directly without having tried below.

  (* Now we decompose the cube with middle sq_ap_compose *)
  (* Note: coq sucks at unifying this so we have to explicitly give paths *)
  refine (cu_concat_lr (sq_ap_compose t2c c2t surf) _
    (sji0:=?[X1]) (sji1:=?X1) (sj0i:=?[Y1]) (sj1i:=?Y1) (pj11:=1)).
  (* Now we reduce (sq_ap t2c surf) *)
  refine (cu_concat_lr (cu_ap c2t (Torus_rec_beta_surf _ _ _ _ _ )) _
    (sji0:=?[X2]) (sji1:=?X2) (sj0i:=?[Y2]) (sj1i:=?Y2) (pj11:=1)).
  (* We now uncurry c2t inside sq_ap *)
  refine (cu_concat_lr (sq_ap_uncurry _ _ _) _
    (sji0:=?[X3]) (sji1:=?X3) (sj0i:=?[Y3]) (sj1i:=?Y3) (pj11:=1)).
  (* Reduce sq_ap2 c2t' loop loop *)
  refine (cu_concat_lr (pr2 (pr2 c2t'_beta)) _
    (sji0:=?[X4]) (sji1:=?X4) (sj0i:=?[Y4]) (sj1i:=?Y4) (pj11:=1)).
  (* Finally flip and sq_ap idmap *)
  refine (cu_flip_lr (sq_ap_idmap _)).

*)

Definition sq_ap011_compose {A B C D : Type} (f : A -> B -> C) (g : C -> D)
  {a a' : A} (p : a = a') {b b' : B} (q : b = b')
  : PathCube (sq_ap011 (fun x y => g (f x y)) p q) (sq_ap g (sq_ap011 f p q))
      apcs apcs apcs apcs.

goals.conclusion:
PathCube (sq_ap011 (fun (x : A) (y : B) => g (f x y)) p q)
  (sq_ap g (sq_ap011 f p q)) apcs apcs apcs apcs

PathCube (sq_ap011 (fun (x : A) (y : B) => g (f x y)) p q)
  (sq_ap g (sq_ap011 f p q)) apcs apcs apcs apcs

contents: (** We now prove t2c is a retraction of c2t *)
Definition c2t2c `{Funext} : t2c o c2t == idmap.

goals.conclusion: t2c o c2t == idmap
t2c o c2t == idmap
forall fst snd : Circle, t2c (c2t (fst, snd)) = (fst, snd)
transport (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) loop 1 = 1

transport
  (fun x : Circle => forall snd : Circle, t2c (c2t (x, snd)) = (x, snd)) loop
  (Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1 ?l) =
Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1 ?l

contents: (* Change the second loop case into a square and shelve *)

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (fun x : Circle => forall snd : Circle, t2c (c2t (x, snd)) = (x, snd)) loop
  (Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1
     (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal))) =
Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1
  (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal))

contents: (* Take the forall out of the DPath *)

goals.conclusion:
forall x : Circle,
DPath (fun t : Circle => t2c (c2t (t, x)) = (t, x)) loop
  (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
     (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
  (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
     (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)

contents: intro x; apply sq_dp^-1; revert x.

goals.conclusion:
forall x : Circle,
PathSquare
  (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
     (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
  (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
     (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
  (ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
  (ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop)

(fun x : Circle =>
 PathSquare
   (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
      (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
   (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
      (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
   (ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
   (ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop))
  base

transport
  (fun x : Circle =>
   PathSquare
     (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
        (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
     (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
        (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
     (ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
     (ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop))
  loop ?b =
?b

transport
  (fun x : Circle =>
   PathSquare
     (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
        (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
     (Circle_ind (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x0)) = (base, x0)) 1
        (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) x)
     (ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
     (ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop))
  loop (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0) =
sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0

PathCube (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0) (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0)
  (sq_dp
     (apD
        (Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1
           (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)))
        loop))
  (sq_dp
     (apD
        (Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1
           (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)))
        loop))
  (sq_dp
     (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
        loop))
  (sq_dp (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop) loop))

?Goal1 =
sq_dp
  (apD
     (Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1
        (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)))
     loop)

?Goal2 =
sq_dp
  (apD
     (Circle_ind (fun x : Circle => t2c (c2t (base, x)) = (base, x)) 1
        (sq_dp^-1 (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)))
     loop)

PathCube (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0) (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0) ?Goal1 
  ?Goal2
  (sq_dp
     (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
        loop))
  (sq_dp (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop) loop))

PathCube (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0) (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0) (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)
  (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)
  (sq_dp
     (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
        loop))
  (sq_dp (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop) loop))

PathCube
  (sq_dp
     (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
        loop))
  (sq_dp (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop) loop))
  (sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0)) (sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0))
  (sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)) (sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal))
?Goal1 = sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0)
?Goal2 = sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal0)
?Goal3 = sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)
?Goal4 = sq_tr (sq_tr^-1 ?Goal)

PathCube
  (sq_dp
     (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
        loop))
  (sq_dp (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop) loop))
  ?Goal1 ?Goal2 ?Goal3 ?Goal4

PathCube
  (sq_dp
     (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => t2c (c2t (x0, x))) loop)
        loop))
  (sq_dp (apD (fun x : Circle => ap (fun x0 : Circle => (x0, x)) loop) loop))
  ?Goal0 ?Goal0 ?Goal ?Goal

contents:
(* refine (cu_concat_lr (sq_ap2_compose c2t' t2c loop loop) _
    (sji0:=?[X1]) (sji1:=?X1) (sj0i:=?[Y1]) (sj1i:=?Y1) (pj11:=1)).
  refine (cu_concat_lr (cu_ap t2c (c2t'_beta.2.2)) _
    (sji0:=?[X2]) (sji1:=?X2) (sj0i:=?[Y2]) (sj1i:=?Y2) (pj11:=1)).
  refine (cu_concat_lr (Torus_rec_beta_surf _ _ _ _ _) _
    (sji0:=?[X3]) (sji1:=?X3) (sj0i:=?[Y3]) (sj1i:=?Y3) (pj11:=1)).
  refine (cu_concat_lr (cu_flip_lr (sq_ap_idmap _)) _
    (sji0:=?[X4]) (sji1:=?X4) (sj0i:=?[Y4]) (sj1i:=?Y4) (pj11:=1)).
  apply sq_ap_uncurry. *)

Definition equiv_torus_prod_Circle `{Funext} : Torus <~> Circle * Circle
  := equiv_adjointify t2c c2t c2t2c t2c2t.
